##NAMES=Kuksite
##RRUFFID=R110039
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Pb_3_Zn_3_TeO_6_(PO_4_)_2_
##LOCALITY=Blue Bell claims, Baker, San Bernardino County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Brent Thorne
##DESCRIPTION=Pale-green short-primatic hexagonal crystals, associated with colorless elongated tabular hemimorphite and yellow to brown-yellow andradite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110039
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.392 b: 8.392 c: 5.186 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 316.27 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
